# Project Refactor Patterns Placeholder

Status: placeholder

Use this file as the canonical refactor style guide for the REFACTOR phase.

## Surrounding Code Review
- Review surrounding functions/modules before refactoring local lines.
- Preserve nearby naming and structural consistency unless improving readability.

## Safe Refactoring Heuristics
- TODO: Define extraction thresholds and readability criteria.
- TODO: Define acceptable helper/builder introduction patterns.

## Refactor-Phase Constraints
- Preserve behavior.
- Run full tests after refactor.
